summary: Tested multi-stop optimized route feature for delivery drivers. Found and FIXED critical bug: 'عرض مسار جميع طلباتي' button was never appearing because myOrders and myFoodOrders props were not being passed to OrdersMap component. After fix, button now appears correctly when driver has accepted orders.

bugs_found_and_fixed.issue: 'عرض مسار جميع طلباتي' button never appeared on the map even when driver had accepted orders (myOrders = 6)
bugs_found_and_fixed.root_cause: In AvailableOrdersList.js, the OrdersMap component was missing myOrders and myFoodOrders props. The condition in OrdersMap.js at line 663 checks (myOrders?.length > 0 || myFoodOrders?.length > 0) but these props were never passed.
fix_applied: Added myOrders and myFoodOrders to AvailableOrdersList props destructuring
Added myOrders and myFoodOrders props to OrdersMap component in AvailableOrdersList
Added myOrders and myFoodOrders props when calling AvailableOrdersList in DeliveryPages.js

test1_login_as_driver.result: Successfully logged in and redirected to /delivery/dashboard

test2_check_accepted_orders.result: Driver has 6 accepted orders (myOrders + myFoodOrders), 14 available orders

test3_map_button_visible.description: Check if 'عرض الخريطة' button is visible

test4_multi_route_button_visible.description: Check if 'عرض مسار جميع طلباتي' button appears when driver has orders
test4_multi_route_button_visible.result: Button now appears as purple gradient button at top of map

test5_route_drawing_requires_gps.description: Route drawing functionality requires GPS location
test5_route_drawing_requires_gps.result: Alert 'يرجى تفعيل موقعك أولاً' shown when clicking button without GPS - expected behavior

action_items: Manual testing recommended: Test route drawing with a real device that has GPS enabled to verify colored segments, numbered markers, and route info card
critical_code_review_comments: OrdersMap.js correctly implements multi-stop routing using OSRM Trip API
Route segments are colored: green for food stores, blue for product stores, red for customers
Numbered markers use divIcon with stop number badges
Route info card shows distance (km), time (minutes), and stops count
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-stop route feature is now properly integrated. The 'عرض مسار جميع طلباتي' button appears when the driver has accepted orders (myOrders > 0 or myFoodOrders > 0). The actual route drawing requires GPS location to work. To fully test: 1) Login as driver 0900000000 2) Accept some orders if none accepted 3) Open map 4) Click 'عرض مسار جميع طلباتي' 5) With GPS, should see colored route segments and numbered stop markers.

feature_behavior_notes.button_visibility: Button only appears when myOrders.length > 0 OR myFoodOrders.length > 0
feature_behavior_notes.gps_requirement: Route drawing requires driver GPS location - shows alert if unavailable
feature_behavior_notes.numbered_markers: Each stop gets a numbered marker (①②③...) with popup showing order details
